description: Execute V0.7 Documentation Patch: Re-architect and rewrite the bilingual documentation portal using a dedicated SubAgent-TechWriter. The documentation must accurately reflect the project's true positioning as a multi-Agent/multi-AI Coding collaboration framework for Personal/Team domains, featuring low cognitive load and low invasiveness.
scope: 1. Replace the L2/L3 'Git diff' interceptor narrative with the true 'Harness/Workflow/Orchestration/Execution/Evaluation/Acceptance' 6-stage collaboration model. 2. Create Mermaid architecture and sequence diagrams. 3. Structure the docs to an open-source standard (e.g., Deer-flow). 4. Use delegate_task to spawn a dedicated Tech Writer agent for the actual content generation.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of .agent-state/ physical migrations. NO modifications to the MCP server. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models. NO new product features.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write implementation code in src/.
Executing without an approved docs-patch contract.
